archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Premium Home Utility
target_audience: Homeowners, office managers, and businesses in Pune looking for professional cleaning services.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A] leading-tight
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-100
header.instructions: Transparent at top, glassmorphic on scroll. Must include 'Book Now' CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F97316] text-white hover:bg-[#EA580C] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-lg shadow-[#F97316]/30
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all shadow-md
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0F172A] text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-[#0F172A] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all

floating_contact.desktop: fixed left-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex flex-col gap-4 z-40
floating_contact.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-200 z-50 flex justify-between items-center p-3 sm:hidden shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

booking_form.instructions: 8-step multi-step form. Use smooth framer-motion transitions between steps. Progress bar required.

service_cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer hover:-translate-y-1 relative overflow-hidden

before_after_slider.style: relative w-full aspect-video rounded-3xl overflow-hidden cursor-ew-resize
before_after_slider.instructions: Use custom slider component to reveal 'Before' and 'After' images seamlessly.

animations.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}. Stagger children arrays.
animations.hover_microinteractions: Scale icons slightly on hover, soft background color shifts.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. e.g., data-testid='book-now-button'

hero_backgrounds.description: Modern bright living room, perfect for hero section background with overlay.
Living room with white couch, great alternative hero.

services_and_cleaning.description: Person in gloves cleaning floor (Deep Cleaning / Floor Cleaning service).
Cleaning crew approaching house (Home/Villa Deep Cleaning).

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React icons for all UI elements. Ensure consistent stroke widths.
